title: Request for Coastal Resilience Project Ideas
summary: 2024-2028 REQUEST FOR PROJECT IDEAS Revised October 5, 2023 This information and an online application are now available on our website. The Alaska Ocean Observing System (AOOS) will be receiving funds from the NOAA Integrated Ocean Observing System (IOOS) under the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) for the period of August 1, 2024-July 31, 2028 . The Request For Application (RFA) is now posted on the IOOS website. The total amount to AOOS is $5M for the...

title: Request for Bids: F/V Dolphin Bay
summary: REQUESTS FOR BIDS The Cordova Port & Harbor is requesting sealed bids for the disposal of vessel Dolphin Bay Vessel Description: 42 ft fiberglass over wood, Albert Jensen & Sons.
